name: requestLogList
description: Lista logs de requests com filtros
code:
SELECT ID, SYNC_SESSION, TIPO,
      CONCAT(SUBSTRING(REQUEST_URL, 1, 80), CASE WHEN LENGTH(REQUEST_URL) > 80 THEN '...' ELSE '' END) AS REQUEST_URL_SHORT,
      REQUEST_URL, REQUEST_METHOD, RESPONSE_CODE,
      SUBSTRING(RESPONSE_BODY, 1, 500) AS RESPONSE_BODY_PREVIEW,
      TICKETS_COUNT, ERRO, DURACAO_MS, DATA
    FROM REQUEST_LOG
    WHERE ('{{session}}' = '' OR SYNC_SESSION = '{{session}}')
      AND ('{{tipo}}' = '' OR TIPO = '{{tipo}}')
    ORDER BY ID DESC
    LIMIT {{limit}}
